neighborhoods.name: Grecia Centro
neighborhoods.description: Known as the cleanest city in Latin America, centered on a unique red metal church and lively central market
neighborhoods.character: Small-town walkable, immaculate, strong Tico culture

housing.predominantType: Houses and apartments near the central park

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Grecia. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: San Isidro de Grecia
neighborhoods.description: Adjacent community with rural character, coffee farms, and slightly cooler elevation

housing.predominantType: Houses on agricultural lots and modest homes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Grecia's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Sarchi
neighborhoods.description: Famous artisan town nearby known for painted ox carts, with affordable housing and traditional craft culture
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: La Garita / Dulce Nombre
neighborhoods.description: Residential area between Grecia and Alajuela with growing expat presence and easy airport access

housing.predominantType: Modern houses and small gated communities

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
